briefing.ai_trends: Continued shift towards agentic AI and autonomous production systems. Integration into real-world infrastructure like energy grids and supply chains is accelerating.
briefing.market_valuation: AI Search Engine market projected to reach $87.63B by 2035. Inference costs for LLMs expected to drop by 90% by 2030, per Gartner.
briefing.infrastructure: Hardware innovation persists with Apple's M5 Neural Accelerator and NVIDIA's $1T Blackwell/Vera Rubin GPU projection. Sustainability and physical infrastructure are becoming key economic constraints.
briefing.ai_search: AI Search market growing at 16.69% CAGR, with high demand for conversational and context-aware engines.
latest_updates: Apple M5 chip AI performance updates
Sustainability as an AI economic factor
briefing.update_notes: Updated for March 25, 2026: Emphasis on long-term cost reduction and sustainability in AI infrastructure, alongside market projections.
